name: file-watcher-collector
description: Monitors a directory for new or modified files matching a pattern and outputs file information.
author: hermes-core

watch_path.title: Watch Directory
watch_path.description: Absolute path to the directory to monitor for new files.

include_existing.title: Include Existing Files
include_existing.description: If true, existing files matching the pattern are included on first run.

min_file_size.title: Minimum File Size (bytes)
min_file_size.description: Ignore files smaller than this size in bytes. 0 means no minimum.

watch_path.ui:help: The directory path to monitor for new files

pattern.ui:help: Standard glob pattern for file matching

files.description: List of discovered files with metadata.
